archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 7 elements. Deep mysterious conspiracy theme merged with high-performance supplement branding.

buttons.primary: bg-[#10B981] text-[#040906] font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none border-2 border-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#34D399] hover:border-[#34D399] transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#10B981] border-2 border-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#10B981]/10 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.accent: bg-[#F59E0B] text-[#040906] font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none border-2 border-[#F59E0B] hover:bg-[#FBBF24] transition-all duration-300

cards.quiz_card: bg-[#0A180E] border border-[#10B981]/20 p-8 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)] hover:border-[#10B981]/40 transition-all duration-500 rounded-sm

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-[#10B981]/30 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:border-[#10B981] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#10B981] rounded-none p-4 w-full transition-colors

components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#040906]/70 border-b border-[#10B981]/10

motion_and_effects.page_transition: opacity-0 translate-y-8 to opacity-100 translate-y-0 duration-700 ease-out

hero_background.description: Dark green abstract wavy background for the landing page hero.

card_texture.description: Dark green metallic abstract texture for card backs and atmospheric elements.

prizes.name: Whey Protein Suplementos Mais Baratos
prizes.description: Premium whey protein tub representing the grand prize.

prizes.name: Creatine Pot
prizes.description: Creatine supplement jar for secondary prizes.

accessibility.contrast_strategy: Ensure text over background images always has a dark overlay gradient (e.g., bg-black/60). Hover states must shift contrast visibly by increasing brightness.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-registration-btn', data-testid='quiz-answer-A').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page to achieve maximum asymmetry and 'Godly.website' style overlapping. Do not use standard Shadcn containers for the marketing sections.
For the admin panel and quiz interaction components, use Shadcn UI but heavily customize them. Strip away the generic 'Vercel' appearance. Change border-radius to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`.
Embrace the 'Retro-Futurism/Terminal' look mixed with Luxury: Use sharp corners, dark backgrounds, high-contrast borders (rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.4)), and subtle glows.
The quiz cards MUST feel tactile. Use framer-motion to create subtle 3D hover effects (`rotateX`, `rotateY`, `translateZ`) as players hover over answers.
Implement an explicit `data-testid` on every single button, link, form input, and structural section to ensure testability.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts/Fontshare.
Never center text blindly; default to left-alignment for body and input labels to maintain the raw, technical visual language.
